name: agent-plugins
description: Codex-consumable marketplace catalog, generated from plugins/<name>/.claude-plugin/plugin.json (derive mode of scripts/generate-cross-platform.mjs). Do not hand-edit; re-run the generator.

plugins.name: claude-token-debug
plugins.description: Debugging toolkit for measuring where Claude Code's real token spend goes: subagent cost/turns, built-in agent prompts and tool schemas.

plugins.name: markvault
plugins.description: Deterministic, offline, ~0-token PDF-to-Markdown extraction: a local CLI selects an extraction strategy (pymupdf4llm, pdftotext+OCR, markitdown) and writes a .md next to the PDF or at an explicit path.

plugins.name: sdd-kit
plugins.description: Spec-driven development kit: skills for the spec.md, the execution plan, and executing it (spec → plan → exec).

plugins.name: token-diet
plugins.description: Explicit-invocation command that analyzes a CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md target, recommends a token-saving-ruleset action, and installs it (base summary + rules doc + versioned mark) on confirmation.
